name: Assault Ramp
raw_text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

name: Surge of Wrath (Psychic)
raw_text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

name: Warrior Strategist
raw_text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP

name: Might of Titan (Psychic)
raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model

name: Fire Focus
raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

name: Fire Support
raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

name: Sanctity of Purpose
raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. lf the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

name: Indomitable Spirit (Psychic)
raw_text: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

name: Aerial Assault
raw_text: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

name: Thunderhawk Cluster Bombs
raw_text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

name: Truesilver Aegis (Aura)
raw_text: While a friendly GREY KNIGHTS unit is wholly within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds.

name: Hammerhand (Psychic)
raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

name: Eye of Judgement (Psychic)
raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

name: Guidance of the Ancients (Psychic)
raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a GREY KNIGHTS model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

name: Wisdom of the Ancients (Aura)
raw_text: While a friendly Grey Knights Infantry unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

name: Champion of the Order of Purifiers (Psychic)
raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Purifying Flame weapons equipped by models in that unit.

name: Foesight (Psychic)
raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll

name: Sanctifying Ritual (Psychic)
raw_text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

name: Techmarine
raw_text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

name: Blessing of the Omnissiah
raw_text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that VEHICLE model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

name: Guardians of the Machine
raw_text: Each time an enemy unit ends a charge move within Engagement Range of one or more GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE units from your army and within 6" of this model’s unit, you can target this model’s unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

name: Sanctic Hood
raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

name: Haloed in Soulfire (Psychic)
raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a attack if the attacking model is within 18".

name: Clarion of Haste (Psychic)
raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

name: Inspiring Exemplar
raw_text: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model in the Fight phase, you gain 1CP and until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its Nemesis force weapon.

name: Righteous Persecution
raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks: until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

name: Strafing Run
raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

name: Personal Teleporters
raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

name: Zealous Path
raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

name: Litanies of Sanctity
raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly GREY KNIGHTS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

name: Attuned Onslaught (Psychic)
raw_text: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by PALADIN SQUAD models in this unit

name: Apothecary’s Narthecium
raw_text: In your Command phase, if the bearer is not destroyed, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding CHARACTERS) to the bearer’s unit.

name: Ancient’s Banner
raw_text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

name: Sanctuary (Psychic)
raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

name: Hammer Aflame (Psychic)
raw_text: Each time this model’s unit fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

name: Force Edge (Psychic)
raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

name: Interceptor
raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

name: Armoured Resilience
raw_text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
